from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SLOConfig:
    latency_threshold_ms: float
    error_rate_threshold: float
    satisfaction_threshold: float


def load_slo_config() -> SLOConfig:
    return SLOConfig(
        latency_threshold_ms=float(os.environ.get("SLO_LATENCY_THRESHOLD_MS", "500")),
        error_rate_threshold=float(os.environ.get("SLO_ERROR_RATE_THRESHOLD", "0.05")),
        satisfaction_threshold=float(os.environ.get("SLO_SATISFACTION_THRESHOLD", "0.95")),
    )


def check_api_health(metrics_collector, slo_config: SLOConfig):
    p99_latency = metrics_collector.get_p99_latency("api")
    if p99_latency > slo_config.latency_threshold_ms:
        trigger_alert("API latency exceeded threshold")

    error_rate = metrics_collector.get_error_rate("api")
    if error_rate > slo_config.error_rate_threshold:
        trigger_alert("API error rate exceeded threshold")


def check_order_slo(metrics_collector, slo_config: SLOConfig):
    success_rate = metrics_collector.get_success_rate("orders")
    if success_rate < slo_config.satisfaction_threshold:
        trigger_alert("Order SLO breached")
